title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that AI and Bitcoin together enable a new economic actor, the "sovereignpreneur," who holds sovereignty over money, production, and personal time. He positions "bring your own agent" as the future of work and describes a sovereignty stack combining sovereign money, machine leverage, and personal freedom.
